welcome.title: Welcome to Nexploy 🎉
welcome.content: Your admin account is ready. Let's take a quick tour to get you started in just a few steps.

docker.title: Docker
docker.content: This is your Docker hub — manage your containers, images, volumes, networks and events, all in one place.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.content: Start here by adding a Git provider (GitHub, GitLab or Gitea). This is the connection Nexploy uses to access your repositories.

account.title: Link your account
account.content: Once a provider is added, come to your account to link your personal account to it. This authorizes Nexploy to clone and deploy your repositories.

repositories.title: Repositories
repositories.content: You're all set! Create your first repository here and deploy it to Docker in a few clicks.
